# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service
  labels:
    app: direct-access-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: your-registry/direct-access-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-worker
  labels:
    app: low-latency-worker
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-worker
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: your-registry/low-latency-worker:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "1Gi"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: network-bypass-api
  labels:
    app: network-bypass-api
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: network-bypass-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: network-bypass-api
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: your-registry/network-bypass-api:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8000
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "150m"
              memory: "192Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "750m"
              memory: "768Mi"
